title: More Compatibility Variants (Fish of Thieves)
description: Adding compatibility for Fish of Thieves' Coconut wood to More Variants Mods. This is NOT an expansion, it simply fixes a crafting issue between these mods and Fish of Thieves.
body:
This datapack adds compatibility between [Fish of Thieves](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/Fish-of-Thieves) and the [More Variants mods](https://modrinth.com/collection/XjGNXbFY) by [LieOnLion](https://www.modrinth.com/user/lieonlion) and [pnku](https://www.modrinth.com/user/pnku).

When using [Fish of Thieves](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves) together with the any of the [More Variants mods](https://modrinth.com/collection/XjGNXbFY) ([MStV](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/More-Stick-Variants)+ mostly unaffected), some of [Fish of Thieves](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves)'s wood types may not work as expected in certain crafting recipes, in this case it's specifically the _Coconut_ wood type.

This primarily affects recipes whose original ingredients accept any vanilla Planks or Logs (such as _Crafting Tables_, _Smokers_, _Chests_, …) if the mod adding Variants to the recipe's result is installed.

![A crafting example of the issue solved by this datapack.](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/r8lt8.png)

> ### Wood Type Matching:
> For this datapack, the _Coconut_ wood type does not craft into the default vanilla result. Instead, it crafts into the closest matching vanilla wood type: _Jungle_!




<details>
<summary>Why does this happen?</summary>

Many vanilla recipes use _Item Tags_ such as `#minecraft:planks` or `#minecraft:logs`, which allow all _Planks_ or _Log_ types to be used interchangeably.

To support wood-specific variants (for example Crafting Tables, Chests, Smokers, …), the More Variants mods override certain vanilla recipes so they no longer accept every plank or log type. This prevents the original vanilla recipe from overriding the variant-specific results.

[Fish of Thieves](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves) correctly adds its wood types to the relevant vanilla tags. However, since some recipes have been narrowed to support variants, those newly added wood types are no longer recognized for the base item.

This datapack accounts for those adjusted recipes and restores compatibility for [Fish of Thieves](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves).

</details>
